nasb.text: Again, they have done this to Me: they have defiled My sanctuary on the same day and have profaned My sabbaths.

esv.text: Moreover, this they have done to me: they have defiled my sanctuary on the same day and profaned my Sabbaths.

cnv.text: 此外，同一天，她們還向我作了這事，就是玷污我的聖所，又褻瀆我的安息日。

ccb.text: 同时，她们还在同一天玷污我的圣所，亵渎我的安息日，
